scenario: Heavy special requirements — lift gate, driver unload, inside delivery, liftgate
subject: Quote Request - Retail Store Deliveries
body:
Hi Jillian,

We have a shipment going from our warehouse in Los Angeles, CA to our new store location in Phoenix, AZ.

- Equipment: 26ft box truck with lift gate
- 1 truck
- Commodity: Retail store fixtures and displays
- Weight: approximately 12,000 lbs
- Pickup: April 18, 2026 (morning preferred, before 10am)
- Delivery: April 19, 2026

IMPORTANT: Driver must assist with unloading. This is an inside delivery — product needs to be brought into the store, not just dropped at the dock. There is no loading dock at the delivery location, so lift gate is mandatory. Also need 2-hour delivery window notification.

Please quote with all accessorials included.

Jennifer Wu
Pacific Retail Group
(310) 555-0445

expected_extraction.special_requirements: Lift gate required (no dock at delivery), Driver assist unload, Inside delivery, 2-hour delivery window notification, Morning pickup preferred (before 10am)
